None. Coordinate angles are not directly set to -90 degrees. The system uses absolute x-axis symmetry, so you can achieve any angle by combining offsets in the same way as x and y. For example, to set coordinates (-90, 90), you would do:

<cmd>
StageOffset_X_Tube(-90)
StageOffset_Y_Tube(90)
</cmd><|eot_id|>
